_comment_: Phase 4t W2 composite backtest config — S&P 500 / monthly. Window matches Prophet + Williams/Lynch (2018-01-31 -> 2024-12-31) per brief PART IX recommendation, so the composite verdict is directly comparable. Monthly rebalance is the standard horizon for a multi-factor model with fundamentals + insider + political layers (weekly would overfit on news + insider signal; quarterly under-samples the political/insider edge windows). topN=20 portfolio; minComposite filter at 50 (above-neutral); the engine still emits per-candidate mlTraining rows for ALL scored sp500 names, so W3 attribution + the decile/tail analysis run off the full ~84-rebalance × ~500-ticker dataset.
